change_description: Add secondary air preheater to improve boiler efficiency by 1.5%
reason: Client requests higher efficiency to meet revised internal energy targets

change_description: Upgrade ESP collecting plates from mild steel to Corten-A due to high SO2 in kiln gas
reason: Site gas analysis showed SO2 levels 30% higher than design basis

change_description: Add bagasse storage and conveying system — originally in customer scope
reason: Client unable to arrange own conveying system; requests Thermax to include in scope

change_description: Foundation redesign for boiler area — soil bearing capacity lower than geotechnical report
reason: Actual SBC 8 T/m2 vs reported 12 T/m2; deeper piling required

change_description: Change heater tube material from CS to SS 316 for Heater #3 due to revised process conditions
reason: ONGC process team revised corrosion allowance based on new feed gas composition

change_description: Add pre-treatment (DAF) unit before RO — effluent characterisation shows higher oil & grease than specification
reason: Site effluent samples during detailed engineering showed O&G at 45 ppm vs 15 ppm design basis
